title: FreqKD: Frequency-Decoupled Knowledge Distillation for Infrared Object Detection
summary: New research proposes FreqKD, a method that addresses challenges in transferring knowledge from RGB to infrared imagery by decoupling distillation based on spatial frequencies, improving object detection.

title: PersonaDrive: Human-Style AI Drivers for Closed-Loop Simulation
summary: A new pipeline addresses the challenge of generic non-ego traffic in closed-loop driving simulators by conditioning Vision-Language-Action (VLA) agents on explicit human driving styles.
